author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
We Motion Captured Scooter... and Built The Most Realistic Muppet Audio-Animatronics Figure Ever!
Walt Disney Imagineering has used motion capture before to help bring Audio-Animatronics figures to life, but for the first time ever, Imagineers used the technology on a Muppet! 

To make the incredible Scooter figure for Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring The Muppets at Disney's Hollywood Studios, Imagineers put Scooter in a motion capture suit to accurately capture the performance by David Rudman and make the most realistic Muppet Audio-Animatronics figure ever.

✨ *What makes this special?*
• A custom-made motion capture suit was made specifically for Scooter
• Imagineers were able to precisely match the movements of the Audio-Animatronics Scooter to the David Rudman performance because of motion capture technology
